title: Deputy Contracts Manager
description:
Why Join Us?

  • Attractive Newcomer Bonus
  • Career Progression & Development Opportunities
  • Opportunity to Work Alongside an Innovative Team

Job Descriptions:

  • Lead/manage a team of Quantity Surveyors in the administration and review of procurement and contract management
  • Review contract documents and providing cost estimates on tenders
  • Prepare and monitor project cost budget, cash-flow for project, track changes in design/construction work, variations and adjust budget projections accordingly
  • Oversee and manage main contract progress claim and subcontract payment including variation claim
  • Resolving contract disputes and contract claims, assessing entitlement for extension of time and loss/expense claim
  • Able to independently lead/manage large scale project
  • Manage record keeping for all contract-related correspondences and documentations
  • Communicate contract-related information to all stakeholders
  • Ensure timely finalization of main and subcontract

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Quantity Surveying / Construction Management / Civil Engineering/ Building or related fields
  • Minimum 5 years relevant experience in contract negotiation, administration and/or management
  • Excellent communication and negotiation skills, analytical mindset, problem solving abilities, as well as keen interest and motivation in a high growth and entrepreneur environment
  • A high level of integrity, dependability with a strong sense of urgency and result oriented

postedCompany.description:
Hwa Seng Builder Pte Ltd (HSB) is a leading civil engineering and construction provider, providing an integrated range of professional civil engineering works and construction-related services in the areas of Aircraft Pavement, Runway and Taxiway, Highways and Expressways, Vehicular Bridges, Drainage works, Earthwork, Golf Course, Roadways, Sewerage, all other Infrastructure works and General Building Construction.

HSB origin can be traced back to 1992, where it was established as part of an enabling strategy to tap their technical know-how, expertise and resources to provide clients with wide spectrum of construction and engineering services.

HSB financial strength is constantly assess by leading credit rating agency. Our sound track records, personnel, and financial standing are additional references when being evaluated for major public tenders.

Over the years, HSB has successfully completed numerous projects and have achieved and received many awards.

Today, by leveraging on our solid track records and expertise in the industry, HSB is registered with the Building & Construction Authority of Singapore under “A1” classification for Civil Engineering (CW02).

HSB unwavering commitment to world-class standards of quality and service can be seen in the many awards garnered. These include ISO 9001, ISO 14001, BS OHSAS 18001, bizSAFE STAR, LTA Certificate of Merit for Construction Environmental Award, LTA Safety Excellence Award and BCA Green & Gracious Award.
postedCompany.name: HWA SENG BUILDER PTE LTD
